# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function show(Request $request)
    {
        $validated = $request->validate([
            'url' => ['required', 'string', 'max:2048'],
        ]);

        $url = trim($validated['url']);

        if (!filter_var($url, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'Invalid URL provided.',
            ], 422);
        }

        if (!$this->isAllowedUrl($url)) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'URL is not allowed.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $html = $this->fetchPageContent($url);

        if ($html === null) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'Unable to fetch URL content.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $preview = $this->generatePreview($url, $html);

        return response()->json($preview);
    }

    protected function fetchPageContent(string $url): ?string
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 5,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 10,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 20,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)',
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
            CURLOPT_HEADER => false,
            CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        ]);

        $content = curl_exec($ch);
        $error = curl_error($ch);
        $statusCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);

        curl_close($ch);

        if ($content === false || $error || $statusCode >= 400) {
            return null;
        }

        return $content;
    }

    protected function generatePreview(string $url, string $html): array
    {
        $title = $this->extractMeta($html, ['og:title', 'twitter:title']);
        $description = $this->extractMeta($html, ['og:description', 'twitter:description']);
        $image = $this->extractMeta($html, ['og:image', 'twitter:image']);
        $siteName = $this->extractMeta($html, ['og:site_name']);

        if (!$title) {
            $title = $this->extractTitle($html);
        }

        if (!$description) {
            $description = $this->extractDescription($html);
        }

        if ($image) {
            $image = $this->resolveUrl($url, $image);
        }

        return [
            'url' => $url,
            'title' => $title ?: null,
            'description' => $description ?: null,
            'image' => $image ?: null,
            'site_name' => $siteName ?: null,
            'host' => parse_url($url, PHP_URL_HOST),
        ];
    }

    protected function extractMeta(string $html, array $names): ?string
    {
        foreach ($names as $name) {
            $pattern1 = '/<meta[^>]+property=["\']' . preg_quote($name, '/') . '["\'][^>]+content=["\']([^"\']+)["\'][^>]*>/i';
            $pattern2 = '/<meta[^>]+content=["\']([^"\']+)["\'][^>]+property=["\']' . preg_quote($name, '/') . '["\'][^>]*>/i';
            $pattern3 = '/<meta[^>]+name=["\']' . preg_quote($name, '/') . '["\'][^>]+content=["\']([^"\']+)["\'][^>]*>/i';
            $pattern4 = '/<meta[^>]+content=["\']([^"\']+)["\'][^>]+name=["\']' . preg_quote($name, '/') . '["\'][^>]*>/i';

            foreach ([$pattern1, $pattern2, $pattern3, $pattern4] as $pattern) {
                if (preg_match($pattern, $html, $matches)) {
                    return html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
                }
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function extractTitle(string $html): ?string
    {
        if (preg_match('/<title[^>]*>(.*?)<\/title>/is', $html, $matches)) {
            return html_entity_decode(trim(strip_tags($matches[1])), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function extractDescription(string $html): ?string
    {
        if (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+name=["\']description["\'][^>]+content=["\']([^"\']+)["\'][^>]*>/i', $html, $matches)) {
            return html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        }

        if (preg_match('/<meta[^>]+content=["\']([^"\']+)["\'][^>]+name=["\']description["\'][^>]*>/i', $html, $matches)) {
            return html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function resolveUrl(string $baseUrl, string $relativeUrl): string
    {
        if (filter_var($relativeUrl, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return $relativeUrl;
        }

        $parts = parse_url($baseUrl);

        if (!$parts || empty($parts['scheme']) || empty($parts['host'])) {
            return $relativeUrl;
        }

        $scheme = $parts['scheme'];
        $host = $parts['host'];
        $port = isset($parts['port']) ? ':' . $parts['port'] : '';

        if (Str::startsWith($relativeUrl, '//')) {
            return $scheme . ':' . $relativeUrl;
        }

        if (Str::startsWith($relativeUrl, '/')) {
            return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $relativeUrl;
        }

        $path = $parts['path'] ?? '/';
        $dir = rtrim(str_replace('\\', '/', dirname($path)), '/');

        return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . ($dir ? $dir . '/' : '/') . ltrim($relativeUrl, '/');
    }

    protected function isAllowedUrl(string $url): bool
    {
        $parts = parse_url($url);

        if (!$parts || empty($parts['scheme']) || empty($parts['host'])) {
            return false;
        }

        return in_array(strtolower($parts['scheme']), ['http', 'https'], true);
    }
}
